content:

C: user_id_exposure ∧ api_security
P: identify_security_risk → verify_session_handling → check_header_security
V: test_user_id_extraction ∧ simulate_missing_user_id ∧ validate_response_codes
R: ! header_injection ∧ ! user_id_guessing
A: exposing_user_id_via_header ∧ risk_of_forged_request

Patch introduces security risks by allowing user ID from headers.

structured_data.audit: Patch introduces security risks by allowing user ID from headers.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_to_async_await
C: minimal_behavior_change ∧ validation_order
P: define_loadUser_async → use_try_catch_for_errors → await_db_findUser → await_audit_log → await_cache_set
V: test_invalid_id ∧ test_user_not_found ∧ test_audit_error ∧ test_cache_error ∧ test_success_case
R: ! behavioral_change_in_error_handling
A: async_function_loadUser(id) ∧ if_no_id_throw('missing_id') ∧ const_user_await_db_findUser(id) ∧ if_no_user_throw('not_found') ∧ await_audit_log(user.id) ∧ await_cache_set(user.id,user)

[AUDIT]
Ensure error mappings remain intact.
